2605.17909.title: Ethical Hyper-Velocity (EHV): A Provably Deterministic Governance-Aware JIT Compiler Architecture for Agentic Systems
2605.17909.paper_summary: As autonomous agentic systems scale across regulated critical infrastructures, the lack of mechanistic, hardware-rooted enforcement for high-frequency policy updates presents a fundamental safety gap. We introduce Ethical Hyper-Velocity (EHV), a novel architectural framework for the formal verification of AI governance policies at runtime. Unlike retrospective auditing frameworks (ISO/IEC 42001, NIST AI RMF) which introduce 14-30 day latencies, EHV relocates the Policy Enforcement Point (PEP) into the inference pipeline via a Governance-Aware Just-In-Time (JIT) Compiler. By integrating Conflict-free Replicated Data Types (CRDTs) for policy synchronization and Epoch-based Attestation Caching within Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs), EHV achieves Sub-millisecond Formal Determinism (SMFD). We demonstrate via TLA+ formal verification that non-compliant agentic actions are computationally unreachable within the system's bounded operating state space. We prove that O(1) runtime enforcement can eliminate the traditional trade-off between deployment velocity and governance integrity, reducing Governance Latency from O(days) to O(1).
2605.17909.paper_summary_zh: 隨著自主代理系統在受監管的關鍵基礎設施中擴展，缺乏機械性、硬體根植的執行來應對高頻政策更新，構成了一個根本的安全缺口。<lb/>我們引入了倫理超高速（EHV），這是一種針對AI治理政策在運行時進行形式驗證的新架構框架。<lb/>與引入14-30天延遲的回顧性審計框架（ISO/IEC 42001，NIST AI RMF）不同，EHV將政策執行點（PEP）重新定位到推理管道中，通過治理感知的即時編譯器（JIT）。<lb/>通過在受信執行環境（TEE）中整合無衝突的複製數據類型（CRDT）以進行政策同步和基於時期的證明緩存，EHV實現了亞毫秒的形式確定性（SMFD）。<lb/>我們通過TLA+形式驗證展示了不合規的代理行為在系統的有限操作狀態空間內是計算上無法達到的。<lb/>我們證明O(1)運行時執行可以消除部署速度與治理完整性之間的傳統權衡，將治理延遲從O（天）減少到O（1）。
2605.17909.author: Riddhi Mohan Sharma et.al.
